---
title: "Other Resources"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## In development
This resource list is under active development. Descriptions and additional links will be added.
:::

# Other Resources

External courses, tutorials, and reference sites for causal inference and targeted learning.

## Online Textbooks and Tutorials

- [Beyond the ATE](https://beyondtheate.com) -- Interactive workshop on modified treatment policies and the `lmtp` package (Nick Williams and Ivan Diaz)
- [TLverse Handbook](https://tlverse.org) -- Comprehensive guide to the targeted learning software ecosystem
- [Introduction to Modern Causal Inference](https://alejandroschuler.github.io/mci/) -- Accessible introduction to causal inference concepts (Alejandro Schuler)
- [Visual Guides to Causal Inference](https://www.khstats.com/) -- Illustrated guides to TMLE, Super Learner, and modified treatment policies (Katherine Hoffman)

## Research Groups

- [van der Laan Lab](https://vanderlaan-lab.org/) -- Mark van der Laan's research group at UC Berkeley
- [UC Berkeley Center for Targeted Machine Learning and Causal Inference](https://ctml.berkeley.edu/) -- Center developing the methods and software in this handbook

## Workshops

- [TMLE Workshop (Ehsan Karim)](https://ehsanx.github.io/TMLEworkshop/) -- Applied TMLE workshop materials with R code
